text: Being here, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation. The sterile corridors and the transparent meeting room evoke the calm before immersion in focused thought or creative exploration. When I move closer to the vivid wall of the R+D space, I am energized by the promise of inquiry and innovation—yet also reminded, through the message on the screen, of the fragility of perception and the ease with which understanding can slip away. Here, I am both observer and participant, invited to contemplate how knowledge emerges or dissolves in the interplay between clarity and confusion.
